===================
=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
10 Oct 01
Sacramento, CA
Memorial Auditorium

Lineage - audio cd-r's > eac secure offset > wav > flac 8

 Disc 1
========
Acoustic:
01 Wait For The Light To Shine (Larry Campbell on mandolin) 
02 Song To Woody 
03 Desolation Row 
04 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Larry Campbell on mandolin)
Electric:
05 Things Have Changed 
06 Summer Days (Tony Garnier on standup bass) 
07 I Want You (Larry Campbell on pedal steel and Bob Dylan on harp) 
08 Cry A While 
Acoustic:
09 Masters Of War (Charlie Sexton on dobro) 
10 Boots Of Spanish Leather 
11 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right  
Electric:
12 Highway 61 Revisited 

 Disc 2
========
01 Sugar Baby (Tony Garnier on standup bass) 
02 The Wicked Messenger (Bob Dylan on harp) 
03 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 
Encore:
04 Love Sick 
05 Like A Rolling Stone 
06 If Dogs Run Free (acoustic - Charlie Sexton & Larry Campbell on electric guitars) 
07 Honest With Me 
08 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 
===================
